headline: Broadcom’s 2nm SoC And BroadPeak Aim At AI And 6G Growth
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) reports shipment of the world’s first 2nm custom compute SoC for AI clusters and high performance computing. The company also launches BroadPeak, a radio digital front end SoC aimed at 5G Advanced and future 6G wireless infrastructure. These chips target data centers and telecom networks, focusing on performance, RF capability and power efficiency. Broadcom, known for its mix of semiconductor and infrastructure software businesses, is pushing deeper into custom...

headline: AI disruption looms over markets with US jobs data on tap
summary: Prospects for artificial intelligence to disrupt business sectors should keep the U.S. stock market on edge in the coming week, as Wall Street looks for more insight into how the emerging technology will reverberate through the economy.  The monthly U.S. jobs report headlines economic data ‌due next week, while major semiconductor player Broadcom is among the remaining reports that will close out the fourth-quarter earnings season.  "There continues to be this ... back and forth about who might be the victim and those ​that will actually emerge winners because they are harnessing AI as opposed to being replaced by it," said Kristina Hooper, chief market strategist at Man Group.

raw.headline: AI disruption looms over markets with US jobs data on tap
raw.summary: Prospects for artificial intelligence to disrupt business sectors should keep the U.S. stock market on edge in the coming week, as Wall Street looks for more insight into how the emerging technology will reverberate through the economy. "There continues to be this ... back and forth about who might be the victim and those ​that will actually emerge winners because they are harnessing AI as opposed to being replaced by it," said Kristina Hooper, chief market strategist at Man Group.
